text.title: GitHub Projects Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of GitHub Projects.

example.scenario: Solo founder + 4 engineers, 2 repos (faion-cli + faion-net). One Project per outcome 'Q2 cli v1.0'; linked both repos; 6 custom fields; iteration axis; automation in .github/workflows/project-automation.yml.
